text: The operation begins with a perimedian subxiphoid 4 cm incision, opening only the anterior aponeurosis of rectus abdominis and finding with the finger a subcostal weight pleura.
A classical one retractor is pushed into the lower cavity giving a working port anterior axis.
Under optic control, the second port is created located subconsciously on the middle axillary line.
This port will give access for a 12mm truck car dedicated to 30° optic and an articulated 5mm grasper for lung exposure.
